title: Registry Audit Ack Cursor v1
description: Local state file written by a trusted off-host audit shipper and read by services to check shipping progress. Runtime health is ok only when acked_at is fresh and last_acked_hash equals the service's live keyed audit-chain tail. The cursor records the shipper's claim; as unsigned local state, it is not cryptographic proof of remote receipt.

acked_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp of when the writer last confirmed delivery of audit events to the off-host destination.

last_acked_hash.description: Chain hash of the last audit entry the shipper claims was delivered. Runtimes bind it to the live keyed chain tail; equality establishes a zero local backlog but does not independently prove remote receipt.

writer.description: Identity of the shipping component that wrote this cursor.
